- publisher=Bloomberg, title=Oil Market Watches Hormuz Reopening Talks With Shipowners Holding Back, directness=high, why=shows market skepticism despite diplomatic efforts, next=https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-06/shipowners-stay-cautious-on-hormuz-despite-hopes-of-a-peace-deal

- publisher=gCaptain, title=Second Qatari LNG Tanker Heads Through Hormuz to Pakistan as Iran War Continues, directness=high, why=provides concrete evidence of non-Iranian commercial transit resuming (May 9), likely under U.S. protection or exemption, next=https://gcaptain.com/second-qatari-lng-tanker-heads-through-hormuz-to-pakistan-as-iran-war-continues-data-shows/

- publisher=Bloomberg, title=Strait of Hormuz Remains Near-Empty With Just a Few Iran Ships Moving, directness=high, why=baseline context: pre-May 4 status, confirms near-total shutdown prior to limited U.S.-escorted transit, next=https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-25/strait-of-hormuz-remains-near-empty-with-just-a-few-iran-ships-moving
